# AIM Foundation

AIM Foundation is a leading NGO in Kolkata, India, dedicated to uplifting underprivileged communities through impactful initiatives in healthcare, education, sustainability, and women empowerment.

## Initiatives

- **Healthcare**: Project Detect (Cancer), OralScan, SightHope (Vision), CycleSafe (Menstrual Health), CareCircle (Urban), CureLine (Rural).
- **Education**: Innocent Smiles (Arts), EduAccess (E-learning), Empower English, DigiEmpower (Digital Literacy), VidyaShakti (AI App), Milieu (Empathy).
- **Environment**: TideShield (Mangrove Restoration), GreenRoots (Reforestation), Roots of Change (Education).
- **Empowerment**: SuiDhaga (Vocational), Krishti (Entrepreneurship), Skill Development Courses.
- **Relief**: Disaster Management and Support for the Underprivileged.

## Corporate Services

- CSR Impact Assessment & Reporting
- Cause-Marketing Partnerships
- Employee Engagement & Payroll Giving

## Contact

- **Email**: info@aimindia.org.in
- **HR**: hr@aimindia.org.in
- **Address**: 41, Ballygunge Terrace, Kolkata 700029.
